dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6648 IH: Federal Acquisition Improvement and Reform Vets Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mrs. Kiggans of Virginia (for herself, Mr. Neguse, and Mr. Bacon) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Small Business

form.official-title: To amend the Small Business Act to adjust sole-source thresholds for service-disabled veteran-owned small business concerns, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Federal Acquisition Improvement and Reform Vets Act or the FAIR Vets Act.

section.header: Modernization of sole-source thresholds for service-disabled veteran-owned small business concerns

subsection.text: Section 36 of the Small Business Act (15 U.S.C. 657f) is amended—

paragraph.text: in subsection (c)(2)(A), by striking $7,000,000 and inserting $10,000,000; and
in subsection (c)(2)(B), by striking $3,000,000 and inserting $8,000,000.

subsection.text: Not later than 180 days after the date of enactment of this Act, the Federal Acquisition Regulatory Council shall amend the Federal Acquisition Regulation (including FAR 19.1406) and the Secretary of Defense shall amend the Defense Federal Acquisition Regulation Supplement to implement the amendments made by subsection (a).
The amendments made by this section shall apply to solicitations issued on or after the date that is 180 days after the date of enactment of this Act.
